title: Summary Verification Spec
description: Defines the mandatory structure of a verification summary emitted in lieu of live proof.

acceptance_criteria.description: List of acceptance criteria with pass/fail/skipped status

files_changed.description: Concrete list of files created or modified

skip_reason.description: Why live proof was not performed

static_evidence.description: Static analysis results, lint output, or schema validation results

workflow_state_transitions.description: Forge workflow state transitions that occurred during execution
